user_context: i missing my best brother from anthor mother
hook: Nobody talks about how much brothers love you in silence.
slide2: I saw his hoodie hanging in my closet today. Still smells like him. And I can't breathe.
slide3: Why does missing someone feel like a stomach punch but nothing else in your body works right?
slide4: I keep checking old messages like he might have replied just now. Duh. He won’t.
closer: What’s one thing you wish you could tell him right now?
caption:
It’s 3am and I’m crying over a hoodie. Missing my brother from another mother feels stupid until it doesn’t. We don’t talk about the quiet ways people love us outside of home. Who else is up at this hour feeling this too? 

#MissingYou #BrotherLove #LateNightFeels #AnotherMother
